series_metadata.series_description: Includes all records which document the licensing of labs to perform breathe analyzer testing. Includes testing results and various licensing information (i.e., applications) revocations.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Maintain for five years, then destroy in conjuction with paper records ; Paper: Retain in office for five years, then destroy provided all audits are completed, Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
